content: Plan: Merge prior branch (feature/fix-critical-and-major-bugs-in-pr-1136-dynamic-test-ports-849d) then fix two relative path references in test/test_simple_commands.py that broke when os.chdir() was removed. Replace relative paths with os.path.dirname(os.path.realpath(__file__)) based absolute paths in test_dump_page_source_valid (~line 482) and test_recursive_dump_page_source_valid (~line 521).
